ModuleName: 1 - Python Environment Setup and Language Fundamentals

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: A structured outline of the module's topics, covering Python environments (IDEs, Jupyter Notebooks), package management (pip, virtual environments), execution modes (interactive vs. script), and variables — used by instructors to plan lessons and by learners to preview what will be covered.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: Lists and explains the major topics covered in the module — including Python programming environments, IDEs, Jupyter notebooks, and language fundamentals — so learners can preview what they will study and instructors can see the module's scope at a glance.

Artifacts.Name: Python_Environment_Setup
Artifacts.Description: This interactive HTML page introduces learners to Python environments and tools, explaining what a Python environment is (interpreter plus supporting tools), why choosing the right one matters, and guiding them through the options available before writing their first code; instructors would assign it as a foundational reading or orientation resource at the start of the course.

Artifacts.Name: Python_Environment_Setup
Artifacts.Description: This interactive HTML page introduces learners to Python environments and tools, explaining what a Python environment is and guiding them through selecting and setting up an appropriate interpreter and editor so they can begin writing, running, and debugging Python code.

Artifacts.Name: Python_Environment_Setup
Artifacts.Description: An interactive HTML lesson that explains Python fundamentals — starting with variables and assignment, including what variables are, naming conventions, and how values are stored and updated — used by learners to read explanations and engage with examples directly in a browser.

Artifacts.Name: Python_Environment_Setup
Artifacts.Description: An interactive HTML page mirroring the main lesson content on Python variables and assignment, serving as a topic-level entry point that lets learners navigate directly to specific subtopics within the module.
